stories.title: Windhorst: Why the stakes of this NBA draft lotter...
stories.summary: How do we know that Sunday's lottery (3 p.m. ET, ABC/ESPN) is massively important to the NBA? A third of a league seemingly tanked just to get into it.

stories.title: Most likely picks for every NBA lottery team
stories.summary: We have the odds, likely picks and best fits for prospects ahead of Sunday's NBA draft lottery.

stories.title: NFL to release regular-season schedule Thursday
stories.summary: The NFL will release its complete regular-season schedule Thursday. The announcement made Friday is in line with the past couple of years, when the schedule has been released during the second week of May.

stories.title: Sources: Seahawks interest 'soft' from buyers
stories.summary: The Seahawks haven't generated as much buyer interest as NFL officials originally expected, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Sources: Iowa, McCollum finalizing 6-year deal
stories.summary: Iowa and coach Ben McCollum are finalizing a new six-year contract after the Hawkeyes' surprising run to the Elite Eight, sources told ESPN.
